title: More documents requested
body: Upload a clearer bank statement and one replacement flood photo to keep your relief request moving.

title: Streetlamp complaint is under review
body: The maintenance desk is validating ownership for the Bukit Bintang crossing issue.

title: Case received
body: Your pothole report has entered triage and the photo packet is visible to the admin desk.

title: Drainage complaint resolved
body: Field maintenance has completed the drain cleaning and your case is now marked resolved.

title: Renewal packet still needs one item
body: Please replace the outdated SSM extract with the latest version before the renewal deadline.
